case_title: TERRY CHEN VS. LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-2-2019 AT 8:30 A.M. D.506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, TERRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2019 BY JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF TERRY CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE REPRESENTED BY JOHN NAJAR, HEARING REPRESENTATIVE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S UTUBE VIDEO IS VIEWED BY THE COURT. DEFENDANT HAS PREVIOUSLY VIEWED PLAINTIFF'S UTUBE VIDEO. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITES ARE REVIEWD AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, TERRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-02-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TERRY CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
